title: psychotria parvifolia
intro: Psychotria parvifolia, also known as the Small-leaf Wild Coffee or Bitter Leaf, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria parvifolia include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
